h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font, left-aligned with significant whitespace above and below.

visual_matchers.pattern: Blue, underlined text within body paragraphs
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Hyperlink to internal or external resources

visual_matchers.pattern: Light gray shaded rectangular box with centered serif text, positioned to the right of main text
Text followed by a vertical pipe and a number at the bottom right
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Page footer containing document title and page number

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Not observed; default to standard LaTeX $...$

layout_info.primary_flow: Single-column main body text with an occasional right-aligned sidebar.
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text in the format 'SIFTing Information | [0-9]+' should be ignored during main content extraction.
